summary: Director Inbox component testing complete. All features verified: API returns aggregated items from 4 sources (escalations, advocacy, roster, momentum), sorted by priority then timestamp. UI displays correctly with priority indicators (red/amber dots), count badge, clickable rows with navigation.
critical_code_review_comments: EscalationsCard is imported but not used in DirectorView.js (line 12) - could be removed for cleaner code
DirectorInbox correctly uses data-testid attributes for all key elements
API sorting logic correctly prioritizes high items first, then sorts by oldest timestamp within each priority group
context_for_next_testing_agent: Director Inbox replaces EscalationsCard on Mission Control. Login as director, navigate to Mission Control to see 'Needs Attention' section. Test IDs: director-inbox, inbox-list, inbox-row-{id}. API: GET /api/director-inbox returns items from escalations, advocacy, roster, momentum sources.

verified_features.1_api_aggregation: PASS - API returns items from all 4 sources (escalation, advocacy, roster, momentum)
verified_features.2_sorting: PASS - Items sorted by priority (high first), then by oldest timestamp
verified_features.3_item_fields: PASS - Each item has: id, athleteName, issueType, priority, timestamp, timeAgo, source, cta (label + url)
verified_features.4_component_renders: PASS - DirectorInbox component renders on Director's Mission Control page
verified_features.5_escalations_replaced: PASS - EscalationsCard is NOT rendered (replaced by DirectorInbox)
verified_features.6_priority_indicators: PASS - Red dots (#ef4444) for high priority, amber dots (#f59e0b) for medium priority
verified_features.7_row_clickable: PASS - Rows navigate to CTA url on click (/support-pods, /roster, /advocacy)
verified_features.8_header_count_badge: PASS - Header shows total count (8) and urgent count (4 urgent)
verified_features.9_border_color: PASS - Border color changes to red (rgba(239, 68, 68, 0.15)) when high priority items exist
